basic.name: Shark Bite
basic.effectText: Bites the enemy. 20% chance to apply Bleed (2 turns).

special.name: Tidal Chomp
special.effectText: A brutal chomp. Deals bonus damage if target is Bleeding.

defense.name: Fin Flick Evade
defense.effectText: Evades the next attack (60% chance).

ultimate.name: Megalodon Rush
ultimate.effectText: Devastating shark rush. Applies Fear (enemy damage -20% for 2 turns).

basic.name: Bat Bonk
basic.effectText: Bonks the enemy with a bat.

special.name: Triple Tung Smash
special.effectText: 3-hit combo. Each hit has 15% chance to Stun (1 turn).

defense.name: Sahur Block
defense.effectText: Blocks the next attack and counters for small damage.

ultimate.name: Midnight Sahur Slam
ultimate.effectText: Huge bat slam. Guaranteed Stun (1 turn).

special.name: Spin Slash
special.effectText: Graceful spinning strike. 30% chance to Dodge next hit.

defense.name: Curtain Step
defense.effectText: Evades next attack (55% chance).

ultimate.name: Grand Finale Dance
ultimate.effectText: Massive performance attack. Boosts own attack for 2 turns.

special.name: Brainrot Blast
special.effectText: Deals damage and applies Confuse (1 turn).

defense.name: Cringe Guard
defense.effectText: Reduces incoming damage by 50% this turn.

ultimate.name: Absolute Brainrot
ultimate.effectText: Massive damage. 25% chance to Stun (1 turn).

basic.name: Croc Snap
basic.effectText: Quick bite. 15% chance to Bleed (2 turns).

special.name: Swamp Roll
special.effectText: Death roll attack. Ignores 30% defense.

defense.name: Scale Armor
defense.effectText: Reduces damage taken by 40% for 2 turns.

ultimate.name: Bombardment Roll
ultimate.effectText: Explosive roll. Deals AoE damage (if multi-enemy).

special.name: Latte Whirl
special.effectText: Spins coffee foam, reducing enemy accuracy (2 turns).

defense.name: Foam Shield
defense.effectText: Absorbs 35 damage.
